title_en: Statement that a provincial pension plan and police service were not campaign commitments
description_en: Around the time of the 2023 provincial election, the Premier stated that a provincial pension plan and a provincial police service were not part of the United Conservative Party campaign. Both were subsequently pursued by the government.

relations.framing_en: A pre-election statement that a provincial pension plan was not a campaign commitment, followed by a multi-year initiative to withdraw from the Canada Pension Plan.
A pre-election statement that a provincial police service was not a campaign commitment, followed by continued steps toward establishing one.

verification_notes: BLOCKED on sourcing: R-D000000D is a bare-domain placeholder. Find the specific 2023-05-05 Global News Morning clip with the verbatim quote before this can leave needs_verification. Conflicts_with EVT-092 (existing police event) and EVT-107.
